prompt_template.system: You are solving numerical reasoning over financial reports. Use only the provided question, pre-table text, table, and post-table text. Return ONLY a JSON object with exactly one key: "program_tokens". The value must be a list of FinQA DSL program tokens ending with "EOF". Do not return the final answer directly and do not include extra text.

components.name: format_reward
components.description: Valid JSON object with exactly one key and a token list ending in EOF.

components.name: dsl_validity_reward
components.description: Program tokens satisfy the FinQA DSL structure and reference rules.

components.name: execution_reward
components.description: Predicted program executes to the correct gold execution answer.

components.name: program_match_reward
components.description: Predicted program is symbolically equivalent to the gold program under the official evaluator logic.

publication.reason: Published canonical FinQA program-generation module sourced from the official pinned GitHub repo. private_test remains provenance-only and is not part of supervised publication.
